description_long: This kiosk is a robust, industrial-style structure with a heavily weathered, dark metallic exterior. The front features a built-in console with a blue digital display and a tactile keyboard, suggesting interactive or control functions. The top surface and sides are textured with a rough, pitted finish, and the rear panel is marked with prominent white caution symbols indicating heat, electricity, radiation, and general hazard. The kiosk is solidly built, with thick side panels and a recessed area beneath the console, providing legroom for a seated user. The overall form is rectangular and blocky, with no visible windows or doors, and the digital display is integrated into the upper front section. The kiosk's utilitarian design and warning signage imply use in high-security or hazardous urban environments.
description: A rugged, industrial kiosk with a weathered metal finish, blue digital display, and prominent caution signage on the rear. Features a built-in console and tactile keyboard.
description_view_0: Front view shows the blue digital display, tactile keyboard, and recessed legroom area beneath the console.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the thick, textured side panel and the profile of the console and display.
description_view_2: Rear view displays large white caution symbols and a solid, blocky back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirrors the other side, showing the console's profile and thick panel construction.
attribute_signage_type: Printed caution signs with hazard symbols on the rear panel; digital display with blue graphics on the front console.
attribute_roof_design: Flat roof, same weathered metal as the rest of the structure, no overhangs or decorative features.
